creator: sven.a.jonsson@bahnhof.se
text:
To be precise, I have seen this in 14.0-RC2 and 14.0-RC3.
in 13.2-RELEASE this has worked without problems.
When installing linux in bhyve, using "https://klarasystems.com/articles/from-0-to-bhyve-on-freebsd-13-1/" as a guide, the mouse freezes in VNC. This makes installing any distro using a pure grphical installer (e.g. MX linux) impossible to install.
If I install void linux so I can run startx, I can type commands in xterm using VNC, but I cannot use the mouse.
I have had the same result using tigervnc-viewer and remmina.
